tweet:
automated the pruning shears. the app showcase now runs daily health checks. if an app breaks, it vanishes until fixed. keeping the ecosystem distinct from the graveyard.

also: API docs now have actual code samples. you're welcome.
alt_tweet:
shipped daily health checks for the app ecosystem. broken apps get hidden automatically. less noise, more signal.

plus: platform badges on app cards and docs that are actually readable. 6 PRs merged.
image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene. Polly the bee mascot (yellow/brown stripes, pink blush) pruning a digital vine with bright lime green (#ecf874) leaves. A few grey 'stale' pixel leaves fall away. The monitor robot holds a checklist with a green checkmark. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley aesthetic. Text in pixel font: 'GARDEN MAINT'. Nostalgic, clean.
reasoning: Uses the 'gardening' metaphor inherent to the brand to explain a technical maintenance feature (health checks). Dry humor about broken apps ('graveyard').
